description: Staged OpenDSS event-window execution config. Stage 1 runs 1 scenario per anomaly type (max 10). If Stage 1 achieves >= stage2_min_successes, config auto-advances to Stage 2 on next run. Stage 3 is manual-enable only.

stage_descriptions.1: Pilot: 1 scenario per anomaly type, max 10 total. Validates OpenDSS event-window works end-to-end.
stage_descriptions.2: Expanded: up to 3 scenarios per anomaly type, max 30 total. Auto-enabled if Stage 1 >= 3 successes.
stage_descriptions.3: Full: all 170 scenarios. Manual enable only (set stage=3 and stage3_manual_only=false).
